criteria.criterion: Ollama unavailable: auto-switch to OpenAI/Anthropic with valid stream
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY set + config.fallback.provider=anthropic: uses Anthropic API
No API key: throws 'OPENAI_API_KEY not set' with provider name
WS register: device joins registry, server replies {type:'registered'}
WS heartbeat: ping/pong works, device removed after 60s no heartbeat
speak/display/capture commands delivered to device, capture returns result
SIGINT: HTTP+WS server closes within 5s, exit code 0
CDN URL accessible, profiles.json cached to ~/.agentic-service/
Model download progress visible in terminal
README has 3 install methods + all REST endpoints with examples
